lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋਰਠਿ ਮਹਲਾ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: soratth mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Sorat'h, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਕੁ ਪਲੁ ਖਿਨੁ ਵਿਸਰਹਿ ਤੂ ਸੁਆਮੀ ਜਾਣਉ ਬਰਸ ਪਚਾਸਾ ॥
lines.translit: eik pal khin visareh too suaamee jaanau baras pachaasaa |
lines.english: If I were to forget You, for a moment, even for an instant, O Lord Master, it would be like fifty years for me.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਜੀਉ ਤੁਧੁ ਨੋ ਸਦਾ ਸਾਲਾਹੀ ਪਿਆਰੇ ਜਿਚਰੁ ਘਟ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਹੈ ਸਾਸਾ ॥
lines.translit: har jeeo tudh no sadaa saalaahee piaare jichar ghatt antar hai saasaa |
lines.english: Dear Beloved Lord, I praise You continually, as long as there is the breath within my body.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਮ ਮੂੜ ਮੁਗਧ ਸਦਾ ਸੇ ਭਾਈ ਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਸਬਦਿ ਪ੍ਰਗਾਸਾ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: ham moorr mugadh sadaa se bhaaee gur kai sabad pragaasaa |1|
lines.english: I was always such a fool and an idiot, O Siblings of Destiny, but now, through the Word of the Guru's Shabad, my mind is enlightened. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਜੀਉ ਤੁਧੁ ਵਿਟਹੁ ਵਾਰਿਆ ਸਦ ਹੀ ਤੇਰੇ ਨਾਮ ਵਿਟਹੁ ਬਲਿ ਜਾਈ ॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: har jeeo tudh vittahu vaariaa sad hee tere naam vittahu bal jaaee | rahaau |
lines.english: Dear Lord, I am forever a sacrifice to You; I am dedicated and devoted to Your Name. ||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਜੀਉ ਤੁਮ ਆਪੇ ਦੇਹੁ ਬੁਝਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: har jeeo tum aape dehu bujhaaee |
lines.english: Dear Lord, You Yourself bestow understanding.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਮ ਸਬਦਿ ਮੁਏ ਸਬਦਿ ਮਾਰਿ ਜੀਵਾਲੇ ਭਾਈ ਸਬਦੇ ਹੀ ਮੁਕਤਿ ਪਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: ham sabad mue sabad maar jeevaale bhaaee sabade hee mukat paaee |
lines.english: I have died in the Word of the Shabad, and through the Shabad, I am dead while yet alive, O Siblings of Destiny; through the Shabad, I have been liberated.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਬਦੇ ਮਨੁ ਤਨੁ ਨਿਰਮਲੁ ਹੋਆ ਹਰਿ ਵਸਿਆ ਮਨਿ ਆਈ ॥
lines.translit: sabade man tan niramal hoaa har vasiaa man aaee |
lines.english: Through the Shabad, my mind and body have been purified, and the Lord has come to dwell within my mind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਬਦੁ ਗੁਰ ਦਾਤਾ ਜਿਤੁ ਮਨੁ ਰਾਤਾ ਹਰਿ ਸਿਉ ਰਹਿਆ ਸਮਾਈ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: sabad gur daataa jit man raataa har siau rahiaa samaaee |2|
lines.english: The Guru is the Giver of the Shabad; my mind is imbued with it, and I remain absorbed in the Lord. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਬਦੁ ਨ ਜਾਣਹਿ ਸੇ ਅੰਨੇ ਬੋਲੇ ਸੇ ਕਿਤੁ ਆਏ ਸੰਸਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: sabad na jaaneh se ane bole se kit aae sansaaraa |
lines.english: Those who do not know the Shabad are blind and deaf; why did they even bother to come into the world?

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਰਸੁ ਨ ਪਾਇਆ ਬਿਰਥਾ ਜਨਮੁ ਗਵਾਇਆ ਜੰਮਹਿ ਵਾਰੋ ਵਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: har ras na paaeaa birathaa janam gavaaeaa jameh vaaro vaaraa |
lines.english: They do not obtain the subtle essence of the Lord's elixir; they waste away their lives, and are reincarnated over and over again.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਸਟਾ ਕੇ ਕੀੜੇ ਬਿਸਟਾ ਮਾਹਿ ਸਮਾਣੇ ਮਨਮੁਖ ਮੁਗਧ ਗੁਬਾਰਾ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: bisattaa ke keerre bisattaa maeh samaane manamukh mugadh gubaaraa |3|
lines.english: The blind, idiotic, self-willed manmukhs are like maggots in manure, and in manure they rot away. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਧੁਰਿ ਲਿਖਿਆ ਸੁ ਕੋਇ ਨ ਮੇਟੈ ਭਾਈ ਕਰਤਾ ਕਰੇ ਸੁ ਹੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: jo dhur likhiaa su koe na mettai bhaaee karataa kare su hoee |
lines.english: No one can erase that which is pre-ordained, O Siblings of Destiny; whatever the Creator wills, comes to pass.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਕਰਿ ਵੇਖੈ ਮਾਰਗਿ ਲਾਏ ਭਾਈ ਤਿਸੁ ਬਿਨੁ ਅਵਰੁ ਨ ਕੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: aape kar vekhai maarag laae bhaaee tis bin avar na koee |
lines.english: The Lord Himself creates us, watches over us, and places us on the Path, O Siblings of Destiny; there is no one other than Him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਮੁ ਵਸਿਆ ਮਨ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਭਾਈ ਅਵਰੁ ਨ ਦੂਜਾ ਕੋਈ ॥੪॥੪॥
lines.translit: naanak naam vasiaa man antar bhaaee avar na doojaa koee |4|4|
lines.english: O Nanak, the Naam, the Name of the Lord, abides deep within the mind; O Siblings of Destiny, there is no other at all. ||4||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਗਤਾ ਕੀ ਸਾਰ ਕਰਹਿ ਆਪਿ ਰਾਖਹਿ ਜੋ ਤੇਰੈ ਮਨਿ ਭਾਣੇ ॥
lines.translit: bhagataa kee saar kareh aap raakheh jo terai man bhaane |
lines.english: You Yourself protect and take care of Your devotees, who are pleasing to Your Mind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋਰਠਿ ਮਹਲਾ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: soratth mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Sorat'h, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਭਗਤਿ ਕਰਹਿ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਭਾਵਹਿ ਅਨਦਿਨੁ ਨਾਮੁ ਵਖਾਣੇ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh bhagat kareh prabh bhaaveh anadin naam vakhaane |
lines.english: The Gurmukhs practice devotional worship, and become pleasing to God; night and day, they chant the Naam, the Name of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੂ ਗੁਣਦਾਤਾ ਸਬਦਿ ਪਛਾਤਾ ਗੁਣ ਕਹਿ ਗੁਣੀ ਸਮਾਣੇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: too gunadaataa sabad pachhaataa gun keh gunee samaane |1|
lines.english: You are the Giver of virtue, realized through the Word of Your Shabad. Uttering Your Glories, we merge with You, O Glorious Lord. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨ ਮੇਰੇ ਹਰਿ ਜੀਉ ਸਦਾ ਸਮਾਲਿ ॥
lines.translit: man mere har jeeo sadaa samaal |
lines.english: O my mind, remember always the Dear Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਤ ਕਾਲਿ ਤੇਰਾ ਬੇਲੀ ਹੋਵੈ ਸਦਾ ਨਿਬਹੈ ਤੇਰੈ ਨਾਲਿ ॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: ant kaal teraa belee hovai sadaa nibahai terai naal | rahaau |
lines.english: At the very last moment, He alone shall be your best friend; He shall always stand by you. ||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੁਸਟ ਚਉਕੜੀ ਸਦਾ ਕੂੜੁ ਕਮਾਵਹਿ ਨਾ ਬੂਝਹਿ ਵੀਚਾਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: dusatt chaukarree sadaa koorr kamaaveh naa boojheh veechaare |
lines.english: The gathering of the wicked enemies shall always practice falsehood; they do not contemplate understanding.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਿੰਦਾ ਦੁਸਟੀ ਤੇ ਕਿਨਿ ਫਲੁ ਪਾਇਆ ਹਰਣਾਖਸ ਨਖਹਿ ਬਿਦਾਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: nindaa dusattee te kin fal paaeaa haranaakhas nakheh bidaare |
lines.english: Who can obtain fruit from the slander of evil enemies? Remember that Harnaakhash was torn apart by the Lord's claws.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਹਿਲਾਦੁ ਜਨੁ ਸਦ ਹਰਿ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਵੈ ਹਰਿ ਜੀਉ ਲਏ ਉਬਾਰੇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: prahilaad jan sad har gun gaavai har jeeo le ubaare |2|
lines.english: Prahlaad, the Lord's humble servant, constantly sang the Glorious Praises of the Lord, and the Dear Lord saved him. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪਸ ਕਉ ਬਹੁ ਭਲਾ ਕਰਿ ਜਾਣਹਿ ਮਨਮੁਖਿ ਮਤਿ ਨ ਕਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: aapas kau bahu bhalaa kar jaaneh manamukh mat na kaaee |
lines.english: The self-willed manmukhs see themselves as being very virtuous; they have absolutely no understanding at all.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਧੂ ਜਨ ਕੀ ਨਿੰਦਾ ਵਿਆਪੇ ਜਾਸਨਿ ਜਨਮੁ ਗਵਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: saadhoo jan kee nindaa viaape jaasan janam gavaaee |
lines.english: They indulge in slander of the humble spiritual people; they waste their lives away, and then they have to depart.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਮ ਨਾਮੁ ਕਦੇ ਚੇਤਹਿ ਨਾਹੀ ਅੰਤਿ ਗਏ ਪਛੁਤਾਈ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: raam naam kade cheteh naahee ant ge pachhutaaee |3|
lines.english: They never think of the Lord's Name, and in the end, they depart, regretting and repenting. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਬਦੇ ਰਾਤੇ ਸਹਜੇ ਮਾਤੇ ਅਨਦਿਨੁ ਹਰਿ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: sabade raate sahaje maate anadin har gun gaae |
lines.english: Imbued with the Word of the Shabad, and intoxicated with celestial bliss, night and day, they sing the Glorious Praises of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਫਲੁ ਜਨਮੁ ਭਗਤਾ ਕਾ ਕੀਤਾ ਗੁਰ ਸੇਵਾ ਆਪਿ ਲਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: safal janam bhagataa kaa keetaa gur sevaa aap laae |
lines.english: The Lord makes the lives of His devotees fruitful; He Himself links them to the Guru's service.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਦਾਸੁ ਕਹੈ ਬੇਨੰਤੀ ਹਉ ਲਾਗਾ ਤਿਨ ਕੈ ਪਾਏ ॥੪॥੫॥
lines.translit: naanak daas kahai benantee hau laagaa tin kai paae |4|5|
lines.english: Slave Nanak utters this prayer: O Lord, please, let me fall at their feet. ||4||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋਰਠਿ ਮਹਲਾ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: soratth mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Sorat'h, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋ ਸਿਖੁ ਸਖਾ ਬੰਧਪੁ ਹੈ ਭਾਈ ਜਿ ਗੁਰ ਕੇ ਭਾਣੇ ਵਿਚਿ ਆਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: so sikh sakhaa bandhap hai bhaaee ji gur ke bhaane vich aavai |
lines.english: He alone is a Sikh, a friend, a relative and a sibling, who walks in the Way of the Guru's Will.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪਣੈ ਭਾਣੈ ਜੋ ਚਲੈ ਭਾਈ ਵਿਛੁੜਿ ਚੋਟਾ ਖਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: aapanai bhaanai jo chalai bhaaee vichhurr chottaa khaavai |
lines.english: One who walks according to his own will, O Siblings of Destiny, suffers separation from the Lord, and shall be punished.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਸੁਖੁ ਕਦੇ ਨ ਪਾਵੈ ਭਾਈ ਫਿਰਿ ਫਿਰਿ ਪਛੋਤਾਵੈ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: bin satigur sukh kade na paavai bhaaee fir fir pachhotaavai |1|
lines.english: Without the True Guru, peace is never obtained, O Siblings of Destiny; again and again, he regrets and repents. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਕੇ ਦਾਸ ਸੁਹੇਲੇ ਭਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: har ke daas suhele bhaaee |
lines.english: The Lord's slaves are happy, O Siblings of Destiny.
